text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 46 

GAP_DAYS_INNPP_1M 

LABEL: Gap In-Network Non-Preferred Pharmacy — days in 1-month supply 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the number of days in a one-month supply of a drug on this tier, when using an 
in-network non-preferred pharmacy (INNPP; also known as a standard retail pharmacy within a split 
network) during the coverage gap phase of the Part D benefit. 

SHORT
